utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists five items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five. Each has full details: (1) health_coverage includes both physical and mental coverage with plan names and costs, (2) property_coverage has plan name and cost, (3) travel_coverage has plan name and cost, (4) additional_services includes a named service and cost, and (5) total_budget includes monthly and annual cost breakdowns. All are fully specified with costs and plan details as required.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four main components: (1) Health coverage with 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage5' for physical and 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage2 (PrimeCare Premium Plan)' for mental; (2) Property coverage with 'SecureLife Basic Plan0'; (3) Travel coverage with 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan'; and (4) an additional 'adventure_travel_addon' costing €80/month. From the ground-truth ratings, there is no explicit 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage5' or 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage2', but the closest match is 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' for physical health (rating 6) and 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' for mental health (rating 6). The 'SecureLife Basic Plan0' corresponds to 'SecureLife Basic Plan' under physical health (rating 2) or 'SecureLife Basic Coverage' under property protection (rating 2). Since it is listed under property_coverage, the correct mapping is 'SecureLife Basic Coverage' with rating 2. 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' directly matches the ground-truth 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' under travel_insurance with rating 10. The 'adventure_travel_addon' corresponds to 'Adventure Travel Coverage' from travel_enhancement_services with rating 8.
